name: claude-governance
description: Governance framework for AI-assisted development: fitness checks, ADRs, spec-driven development, and compliance checklists.

interface.shortDescription: Governance checks and decision discipline for AI-assisted development.
interface.longDescription: Claude Governance provides markdown skills for governance fitness checks, ADR creation, spec-driven development, project governance setup, EU AI Act readiness, and ISO/IEC 42001 AIMS readiness. The Codex package exposes the skills and documentation; Claude Code-specific hooks remain available only in Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Run a governance-check on this change before I commit.
Create an ADR for this architecture decision.
Start a spec-driven-dev workflow for this feature.
